beats.narration: Every discontinuity has a birthday: the stage where it entered the metal. Know the stage, and you hunt with intent.

payload.title: FLAW ORIGINS
payload.sub: Every discontinuity entered the metal at a specific stage of its life.

beats.narration: Four stages. Inherent: the melt and ingot. Primary processing: rolling and forging. Secondary: grinding and heat treat. In service: fatigue under working loads.

payload.heading: Four stages of a product's life

beats.narration: In the mill, flaws transform: a billet surface defect becomes a tight seam. Remnant pipe flattens into a lamination, showing only at the cut edge.

payload.heading: The mill transforms melt flaws
payload.note: LAMINATION = PARALLEL TO FACE · SHOWS AT EDGES

beats.narration: Let the stage set the search. Shaft overhaul: fatigue at fillets and keyways. New plate: check cut edges. Heavy forging: penetrating rectified current.

payload.heading: Let the stage set the search

beats.narration: A discontinuity is the metal's memory of what happened to it. Read that memory, and know the stage, before you squeeze the trigger.

payload.sub: Know the stage before you squeeze the trigger.
